reference: Hi, I am eleven point five weeks pregnant, and when I went to the bathroom, it looked like I had urinated straight blood. In weeks seven to ten, I had brown spotting only when I urinated. There was no cramping or pain. I have had three normal pregnancies, and the last three have ended in miscarriage. I am worried about this one.
text: Hi, I am 11.5 weeks pregnant and when I went to the bathroom, it looked like I had urinated straight blood. In weeks 7 to 10, I had brown spotting only when I urinated. There was no cramping or pain. I have had 3 normal pregnancies and the last 3 have ended in miscarriage. Being worried about this one.
